canonical_definition: A structured benchmark assessing LLMs on chemical error detection, localization, explanation, and revision using 1,193 expert-annotated molecular description errors.
papers: Mitigating Hallucinations inLM-BasedTTSModels via Distribution Alignment UsingGFlowNets

relationships.paper: Mitigating Hallucinations inLM-BasedTTSModels via Distribution Alignment UsingGFlowNets
relationships.evidence: MOLERR2FIX introduces a structured chain-like, four-stage Error-to-Fix evaluation pipeline—detection, localization, explanation, and revision—offering a fine-grained and progressive framework for assessing LLMs in chemical reasoning. (Section 1)
